   - Replace `xunit` (v2) with `xunit.v3` (v3)
   - Remove `xunit.runner.visualstudio` — v3 projects are self-executable (no need for a runner adapter)
   - Remove `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk` — not needed for v3
   - Replace `Xunit.Combinatorial` with `xunit.v3.assert.combinatorial` or check what the v3 equivalent is
   - Also need to swap `Xunit.StaFact` for its v3 counterpart
   - Change `<OutputType>` to `Exe` since v3 tests run as standalone executables
   - The `net8.0-windows` target framework should work fine

2. **`CombinatorialTests.cs`**:
   - The `using Xunit;` namespace stays the same, though some APIs have shifted in v3
   - Need to verify the v3 syntax for `[Theory, CombinatorialData]` and `[StaFact]` attributes

## xUnit.net v3

xUnit.net is a developer testing framework, built to support Test Driven Development, with a design goal of extreme simplicity and alignment with framework features. Supports .NET Framework 4.7.2 or later and .NET 8 or later.

Installing this package installs xunit.v3.mtp-v1.

xUnit.net is a free, open source, community-focused unit testing tool for C#, F#, and Visual Basic. xUnit.net v3 supports .NET 8.0 or later, and .NET Framework 4.7.2 or later.

xUnit.net works with the [.NET SDK](https://dotnet.microsoft.com/download) command line tools, [Visual Studio](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/), [Visual Studio Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/), [JetBrains Rider](https://www.jetbrains.com/rider/), [NCrunch](https://www.ncrunch.net/), and any development environment compatible with [Microsoft Testing Platform](https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/testing/microsoft-testing-platform-intro) or [VSTest](https://github.com/microsoft/vstest).

Now I have all the version information I need. Let me also check what the `Xunit.StaFact` v3.0.13 requires, since the StaFact README said "Use v3.0+ versions of this package for use with xunit.v3 v3+". Migration complete. Here's a summary of changes:

**`TestProject.csproj`:**
- Added `<OutputType>Exe</OutputType>` (v3 tests are self-hosting executables)
- `xunit` 2.9.3 → `xunit.v3` 3.2.2
- Removed `xunit.runner.visualstudio` and `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk` (not needed in v3)
- `Xunit.Combinatorial` 1.6.24 → 2.0.24 (v3-compatible)
- `Xunit.StaFact` 1.1.11 → 3.0.13 (v3-compatible)

**`global.json`:** Changed test runner from `VSTest` to `Microsoft.Testing.Platform`

**`CombinatorialTests.cs`:** No changes needed — the `Xunit` namespace, attributes, and assertions are API-compatible.
